subject: Robin Hood Heroes Breakfast - December 4, 7:45am
body:
Dear Dana and Jeffrey,



On behalf of the Robin Hood Board and Leadership Council, it's my honor to invite you to our annual Heroes Breakfast.



Tuesday, December 4, 2018

7:45am Breakfast | 8:00 - 9:00am Program (begins and ends promptly)

Cipriani 42nd Street | 110 East 42nd Street, New York City



RSVP to Kate: events@robinhood.org<mailto:events@robinhood.org> | 212-844-3542



The testimonies you will hear will stay in your heart and mind all year. We hope you can join us.


Sincerely,
Robin Hood
[cid:image001.jpg@5BD0C831.00D17DB3]
body_html:
Dear Dana and Jeffrey,

 

On behalf of the Robin Hood Board and Leadership Council, it's my honor to invite you to our annual Heroes Breakfast.

 

Tuesday, December 4, 2018

7:45am Breakfast | 8:00 - 9:00am Program (begins and ends promptly)

Cipriani 42nd Street | 110 East 42nd Street, New York City

 

RSVP to Kate: events@robinhood.org | 212-844-3542

 

The testimonies you will hear will stay in your heart and mind all year. We hope you can join us.

 

Sincerely,

Robin Hood
